LanguageData.CQF_SearchFail: There are nothing valuable to search for.
LanguageData.CQF_SearchInsect: Some insects have crawled out of the remains!
LanguageData.CQF_GorgeousTreasures: Gorgeous treasures emerge from it! Among them, there are {0}
LanguageData.CQF_ArtifactsTreasures: The treasure chest is filled with an ancient atmosphere, some artifacts({0}) woke up
LanguageData.CQF_OpenSarcophagus_Treasures: The sarcophagus is filled with rich and magnificent burial items! Burial items include{0}
LanguageData.CQF_OpenSarcophagus_Poor: There is only one white bone and some tattered burial({0}) items in the sarcophagus，It seems that this white bone is not wealthy
LanguageData.CQF_OpenSarcophagus_Mechanoid: Red lights shot out from the sarcophagus, it seem indicating that we have a big trouble
LanguageData.CQF_OpenSarcophagus_PlasmaSword: A plasmasword with a red glow was held by a skeleton in the sarcophagus, as if the deceased had been a brave warrior during his lifetime
LanguageData.CQF_IsDeveloping: The front area is under development
